notes: Captured at Wave 4 head + turbo Phase 2 integration (TurboState with τ=0.20s, multiplier [0.5, 1.0], MAX_BOOST 4.8 bar). Boost lag shifts launch/DRS times slower vs pre-turbo (0-100: 2.29s → 2.83s; DRS 200-300: 4.85s → 4.93s). Cornering & stop-distance shifts are second-order effects from RPM/gear progression during warm-up. Replaces the wave-4-final fixture as the new strict ±0.5% gate for the turbocharger component.
